homepage.browseTasksSubtitle: Get paid to get things done!
homepage.description1: Got a task? Someone nearby can help.
homepage.description2: Whether you're new in town or consider yourself a local, Taskorilla helps you get tasks done locally or earn cash by helping others.
homepage.description3: Big jobs, small jobs, or anything in between, find trusted helpers or professionals, or offer your skills, and get results quickly and safely.
homepage.postTaskSubtitle: Get help to get things done locally!

landing.brainyBrawnyText: Skilled, reliable, and clever. Our helpers tackle tasks big and small, from everyday errands to professional services. Show off your skills, services, or professional role, earn badges, collect reviews, and get noticed.
landing.communityText: Taskorilla is not just a service. It is a community of smart, strong helpers and taskers making life easier. Shareable profiles, badges, and discoverable skills make it simple, fun, and effective.
landing.fastLocalText: Helpers nearby see your tasks instantly. They can submit offers, and chat in real time. Taskers can search for helpers by skills, services, or professional role to find the perfect match.
landing.flexibleText: Set your budget, choose the best fit, and stay in control. Your information stays private, and instant alerts keep you in the loop. Post tasks and offer help without juggling multiple accounts.
landing.heroSubtitle:
Simple errands or tricky challenges, Taskorilla connects you with Helpers who think fast, work smart, and get things done without the hassle.

By using our platform, you're not just getting tasks done, you're also supporting the local economy and helping skilled Helpers earn a fair living.
landing.mascotText: Post your task today and let Taskorilla handle the heavy lifting, with brains, brawn, and brilliance.
landing.step1Text: Need something done in Portugal? Post as many tasks as you like for free, set a budget or request a quote, and Helpers can send offers instantly. When you accept an offer, you pay your agreed amount plus a €2 fee. Funds are only released when the job is completed. Get things done quickly with trusted Helpers.
landing.step2Text: Pick up extra work, use your skills, and get hired fast. Get paid on completion, minus a 10% commission. Build your reputation with badges, reviews, and a shareable profile. Perfect for professionals and handymen.
landing.step2NewText: Receive notifications about tasks that truly match you. Set how far you’re willing to travel and how often you receive “New task” emails.
landing.step3Text: Message your Helper or Tasker, track progress, share photos, and mark the task complete when it’s done. Leave and receive reviews to build trust and show reliability. Stay in control every step of the way.
landing.trustText: Reviews go both ways. Taskers can review helpers, and helpers can review taskers. Track progress, upload photos, and see verified feedback so everyone knows who's reliable.

conduct.title: The Taskorilla Professional Conduct Guide
conduct.subtitle: How to stay steady and successful.
conduct.intro: At Taskorilla, we don't just "get jobs done", we build trust. To keep the platform safe and professional, all Helpers and Taskers agree to follow these three pillars of conduct:
conduct.pillar1Lead: We believe a deal is only a deal when both sides are 100% clear.
conduct.noLowBallingBody: Don't bid a price you have no intention of honoring just to open a chat.
conduct.finalSayBody: Use the "Confirm Final Price" button as your ultimate check. Once you click it, you are committed to that price.
conduct.scopeIntegrityBody: If a Tasker asks for more work during the chat, don't just "agree" and complain later. Use the Adjust Bid or Withdraw options to keep the price honest.
conduct.pillar2Lead: Keep communication clear and don't create panic or confusion.
conduct.beResponsiveBody: If you're in a "Pending Payment" state, don't leave the Tasker hanging. Confirm or Withdraw promptly.
conduct.noSideDealsBody: Taking a job "under the table" removes your protection. If it doesn't happen in Taskorilla, it cannot protect your payment or your reputation.
conduct.respectfulExitsBody: If a job isn't a fit, use the Withdraw button. Ghosting a Tasker is unprofessional and leads to account pauses.
conduct.startWhenSecuredBody: Only begin physical work once you see the "Payment Secured" notification.
conduct.finishWithPrideBody: Complete the work to the standard agreed upon in the chat.
conduct.honestCompletionBody: Taskers should mark jobs "Complete" as soon as the work is verified. Helpers should never pressure a Tasker to release funds before the work is done.
conduct.enforceBodyPrefix: Accounts that consistently Scurry, by withdrawing too many accepted bids, ghosting Taskers, or attempting off-platform payments, will be
conduct.enforceBodySuffix: . We do this to ensure that when a Tasker sees a Helper, they know they are looking at a pro. If it continues the Helper will be removed from the site completely.

bidding.step1Body: Placing a bid unlocks the chat with the task owner. This lets you ask questions, clarify details, and make sure you fully understand the job before committing.
bidding.step2Intro: The price you enter in your bid is not final yet. The price only becomes official when:
bidding.step2Li1: The task owner accepts your bid
bidding.step2Li2: You confirm that you're happy to do the job for that price
bidding.step3Body: Once both steps are complete, the task is officially yours. You can now start the job knowing the details and payment are agreed.
bidding.tipBody: Think of placing a bid as opening a conversation — it's the first step, but the job isn't yours until both sides agree.

user.accountNoLongerActive: This account is no longer active.

taskDetail.readyToTalkBody: Submit a bid to unlock messaging with the Tasker and secure your payment in our Secure Vault. Don't worry—you can adjust your bid anytime if the job details change after chatting.
taskDetail.totalPricePlaceholder: Enter the total amount you will charge
taskDetail.priceJustificationPlaceholder: Explain what's included, materials or time required, and anything the poster should know.
taskDetail.bidChatFootnote: Placing a bid unlocks the chat. The price is only final once the task owner accepts and you confirm.
taskDetail.withdrawConfirmPending: Are you sure you want to withdraw your accepted bid of {amount}? The task will reopen for new bids and the task owner will be notified.
taskDetail.withdrawConfirmOpen: Are you sure you want to withdraw your bid of {amount}? The task owner will be notified.
taskDetail.bidWithdrawnReopened: Your bid has been withdrawn. The task is now open again for new bids.
taskDetail.bidWithdrawnNotified: Your bid has been withdrawn. The task owner has been notified.
taskDetail.bidSelectedMustConfirm: Bid selected. The helper must confirm the final price on the task page before you can pay.
taskDetail.failedAcceptBid: Failed to accept bid. Please try again.
taskDetail.priceFinalBothSides: The price is only final once both sides agree — the task owner accepts and the helper confirms.
taskDetail.noBidsYet: No bids yet. Be the first to bid!
taskDetail.progressBidSelected: {tasker} has selected {helper}'s bid of {amount}. Waiting for {helper} to confirm the final price.
taskDetail.almostThereBody: You've accepted this bid. The helper now needs to confirm they're happy with the agreed price. Once they confirm, the Pay Now button will unlock so you can complete payment.
taskDetail.paymentRequiredBody: Complete payment below to confirm the assignment and allow work to begin.
taskDetail.helperAwaitingPaymentBody: Your bid has been selected and the final price is confirmed. The task owner can pay when ready. You'll be notified by email once payment is confirmed.
taskDetail.doNotBeginWork: Please do not begin work until you receive confirmation.
taskDetail.helperConfirmPriceBody: Your bid was selected. Please review the amount below and confirm it matches what you agreed in chat before the tasker can pay.
taskDetail.observerAwaitingPayment: A helper has been selected. The task owner is completing payment.
taskDetail.confirmFinalPriceBody: The Tasker is ready to pay {amount}. If you're happy with the price and have all the details you need, confirm below. Still have questions? Message the tasker first.
taskDetail.notHappyWithdrawHint: Not happy with the price? You can withdraw your bid and the task will reopen for new offers.
taskDetail.payUnlocksAfterConfirm: Pay unlocks after your helper taps "Confirm final price" on this task.
taskDetail.paymentFailedRetry: Payment failed. Please try again when ready.
taskDetail.bidSubmitPausedMessage: Your account has been paused. You cannot submit bids. Please contact support.
taskDetail.bidHelperRoleMessage: You must enable the Helper role in your profile to bid on tasks. Go to your Profile page and enable the Helper role to start bidding.
taskDetail.bidHelperRoleUpdateMessage: You must enable the Helper role in your profile to manage bids.
taskDetail.bidUpdatePausedMessage: Your account has been paused. You cannot update bids.
taskDetail.messageTooShortMessage: Please provide a more detailed message for the client. (Minimum 50 characters)
taskDetail.tooManyActiveBidsMessage: You have too many active bids. Please wait for some to be accepted or declined.
taskDetail.bidCooldownMessage: You can submit another bid in {minutes} minute(s). This helps ensure quality bids for taskers.
taskDetail.cannotUpdateBidMessage: You can only change a bid while it is still pending and the task is open.
taskDetail.adjustBidModalIntro: Update your total price and notes. The tasker will be notified and a short notice is added to your chat thread.
taskDetail.releaseBidConfirm: Are you sure you want to release {helper} and their bid of {amount}? The task will reopen for new bids and the helper will be notified.
taskDetail.releaseBidButton: Changed my mind — release this bid
taskDetail.releaseBidSuccessMessage: The bid has been released and the task is open for new bids.
taskDetail.releaseBidError: Could not release the bid. Please try again.
